title: "Ideas: Feature Request or Enhancement"

**Share your idea for OmniCompute!**

Have an idea to improve OmniCompute? We'd love to hear it. This is the place for feature requests, enhancements, and feedback.

## Idea Summary

<!-- What's your idea? 1-2 sentences -->

## Problem It Solves

<!-- What problem or gap does this address? -->

## Proposed Solution

<!-- How would this feature work? What would users do? -->

## Use Case

<!-- When/why would someone use this? Concrete example -->

## Alternatives Considered

<!-- Are there other ways to solve this? What are the tradeoffs? -->

## Acceptance Criteria

<!-- What would make this feature complete? -->
- [ ] Criterion 1
- [ ] Criterion 2
- [ ] Criterion 3

## Additional Context

<!-- Links to related issues, discussions, or references -->

---

**Thanks for the feedback!** Feature requests help shape OmniCompute's future. 🎯
